title: Most Countries Perceive China As Leading The AI Race Over US: Poll
description: In major U.S. allies, including France, Canada, and the United Kingdom, China is perceived as being ahead of the U.S. in the artificial intelligence race, according to a new poll.
content:
China is increasingly being viewed as the world's leading artificial intelligence power over the United States despite Silicon Valley's dominance in developing intelligence models, according to a new poll.
Conducted by London-based research firm Publ... [3451 chars]

title: Nvidia joins AI borrowing frenzy with $25 million bond sale
description: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. sold $25 billion of high-grade bonds, joining a wave of jumbo debt offerings from tech heavyweights as investors clamor to get exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.
content:
Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. sold $25 billion of high-grade bonds, joining a wave of jumbo debt offerings from tech heavyweights as investors clamor to get exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.
The deal, priced on Monday, attracted as much a... [3433 chars]

title: Bank branch closures set to hit staff more than AI
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) adoption in Thailand's banking sector is unlikely to have a rapid impact on employment, with the decline in bank staff primarily driven by branch closures, according to the central bank governor.
content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) adoption in Thailand's banking sector is unlikely to have a rapid impact on employment, with the decline in bank staff primarily driven by branch closures, according to the central bank governor.

title: Tech Surges as AI Rally Regathers Steam - Tech Roundup
description:

content:

title: SpaceX raises $86B in record-breaking IPO
description: By Andrew Moran Contributing Writer  SpaceX raised almost $86 billion from last week’s record initial public offering — also known as an IPO — after major brokers exercised their overallotment of shares, the company said on Monday.  Elon Musk’s rocket, artificial intelligence and […]
content:
By Andrew Moran
Contributing Writer
SpaceX raised almost $86 billion from last week’s record initial public offering — also known as an IPO — after major brokers exercised their overallotment of shares, the company said on Monday.

title: Tech experts urge White House to ease off Anthropic AI restrictions

title: Cybersecurity Executives Urge the Trump Administration to Ease Restrictions on Anthropic AI Models
